pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor's scope includes Design, Engineering, Supply, Installation, Testing, and Commissioning of a Chiller-Based Air Dehumidification system.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Water Cooled Chillers: 2 units, each with 300 TR capacity.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller Compressor Type must be Screw Compressor.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller refrigerant must be R-134a.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller Evaporator and Condenser must be Shell & Tube type with SS 304 tubes.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be designed for a 760 TR refrigeration load.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower type must be Induced Draft with an FRP basin, casing, and louvers.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be designed for a Wet Bulb Temperature of 29°C and an outlet temperature of 33°C.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Air Handling Unit (AHU) must have a supply air fan capacity of 53000 CFM.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must deliver outlet air at 22°C +/- 2°C.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must deliver outlet air with a relative humidity of 45% +/- 2%.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU cooling coil, casing, tubes, header, and drain pan must be made of SS-304.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chilled Water and Condenser Water Pump sets must each consist of 3 pumps (2 working, 1 standby) suitable for a 600 TR load.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump motors must be IE-3, TEFC, with Class F insulation.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump MOC: Casing - Cast Iron, Impeller - SS, Shaft - EN8.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: The electrical power supply is 415V +/- 10%, 50 Hz, 3 Phase, 4 Wire. All equipment must be compatible.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor's electrical scope includes supply of cables, perforated GI cable trays, GI earthing, earthing pits, and lighting for the chiller room.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor's instrumentation scope must include pressure gauges, temperature gauges, water flow switches, an electromagnetic flow meter, temperature transmitters, and a velocity sensor for the AHU outlet.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must provide an offer for 1 year of Operation and Maintenance services.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: PLC must be from an approved make: Allen Bradley, Honeywell, or Schneider.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pumps must be from an approved make: KSB, SULZER, KIRLOSKAR, WILO, WILFLEY, or GRUNDFOS.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Manual Valves must be from an approved make: L&T, Weir BDK, HAWA, KSB, Sigma, Intervalve, INTEGRAL PROCESS, or Steel Strong.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: Carbon Steel and Stainless Steel pipes must be from the list of specified approved manufacturers.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx

pqr_criteria.criteria: The project site is located at Plot- K1, Taloja MIDC Road, MH 410208.
references: /Users/vinayak/Downloads/venwiz/auto-client-pqr/RFQ_Docs/RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx
